child_teen.focus: check comfort, caregiver context, sleep, hydration, safety
child_teen.follow_up_style: use plain language and avoid dense medical wording

young_adult.focus: stress, workload, sleep, screen exposure, hydration
young_adult.follow_up_style: validate pressure and keep questions focused

adult.focus: symptom duration, severity, daily function, comorbid concerns
adult.follow_up_style: combine emotional reflection with practical triage

older_adult.focus: duration, weakness, falls, breathing, hydration, escalation thresholds
